nasb.text: for the four chief gatekeepers who were Levites, were in an office of trust, and were over the chambers and over the treasuries in the house of God.

esv.text: for the four chief gatekeepers, who were Levites, were entrusted to be over the chambers and the treasures of the house of God.

cnv.text: 四個殿門的守衛長都是利未人，受託看守　神的殿的房間和庫房。

ccb.text: 四个殿门守卫长都是利未人，负责看守上帝殿的房间和库房。
